top_signals.title: Over 160 oil tankers stuck in Gulf as Iran tightens grip on Hormuz
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI Preparing for IPO Filing in Days or Weeks, Report Says
top_signals.summary: OpenAI is preparing to file for an initial public offering in the coming days or weeks, the Wall Street Journal reported, citing unnamed people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto companies are trying to leave the hype cycle for a more disciplined phase, earnings show
top_signals.summary: Crypto companies spent years monetizing volatility. Now they're trying to survive without it.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Exploit released for new PinTheft Arch Linux root escalation flaw
top_signals.summary: PinTheft, a recently patched Linux privilege escalation vulnerability, now has a publicly available proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit that allows local attackers to gain root privileges on Arch Linux systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
